Ticket Title: [Fltr] Note CDP - Setup Feature Flag and Configuration
Title: User able to see Notes section in CDP Contact Detail when enabled_note_cdp flag is ON
Preconditions:
- Device: Android/iOS
- C360 mode: enabled
- Firebase: enabled_note_cdp = true
- User has customers_customernotes_view permission
- Navigate to CDP Contact Detail
Steps:
1. Launch CRM Mobile app
2. Navigate to Contacts list
3. Tap a CDP contact to open Contact Detail
4. Scroll to 'Other' tab and locate Notes section
Expected Result: Notes section is visible in the 'Other' tab

Ticket Title: [Fltr] Note CDP - Setup Feature Flag and Configuration
Title: User not able to see Notes section in CDP Contact Detail when enabled_note_cdp flag is OFF
Preconditions:
- Device: Android/iOS
- C360 mode: enabled
- Firebase: enabled_note_cdp = false
- Navigate to CDP Contact Detail
Steps:
1. Launch CRM Mobile app
2. Navigate to a CDP contact
3. Tap to open Contact Detail
4. Open 'Other' tab and scroll to Notes area
Expected Result: Notes section is NOT visible in the 'Other' tab

Ticket Title: [Fltr] Note CDP - Setup Feature Flag and Configuration
Title: User able to see Notes section in legacy (non-C360) mode regardless of enabled_note_cdp flag
Preconditions:
- Device: Android/iOS
- C360 mode: disabled (legacy mode)
- enabled_note_cdp = false
- Navigate to Contact Detail
Steps:
1. Launch CRM Mobile app in legacy mode
2. Open any contact
3. Navigate to Notes section
Expected Result: Notes section is visible (legacy behavior preserved; flag has no effect)

Ticket Title: [Fltr] Note CDP - Setup Feature Flag and Configuration
Title: Notes section appears after enabled_note_cdp flag is toggled ON remotely
Preconditions:
- C360 enabled
- enabled_note_cdp initially false
- Firebase Remote Config updated to true externally
Steps:
1. Open app with flag OFF
2. Confirm Notes section hidden in CDP Contact Detail
3. Update Firebase Remote Config flag to ON
4. Force remote config refresh or reopen app
5. Navigate to CDP Contact Detail
Expected Result: Notes section becomes visible after flag update without app reinstall

Ticket Title: [Fltr] Note CDP - Data/Domain Layer: Get Notes List
